hypothesis: Using frozen pre-trained single-gas neural networks as feature extractors, concatenated with gas-fraction inputs and processed by a GraphSAGE two-node graph model, will predict radial etching rates for Ar/O2 mixtures more accurately and generalize better to withheld high-power/pressure and low-argon regimes than a baseline FNN or alternative GNNs (GCN, GAT), with intermediate hidden-layer features yielding the best performance.
